en: Then Jesus was led up by the Spirit into the wilderness to be tempted by the devil.
zh: 隨後，耶穌被聖靈帶到曠野，受魔鬼的試探。

en: And after fasting forty days and forty nights, he was hungry.
zh: 耶穌禁食了四十晝夜，就餓了，

en: And the tempter came and said to him, "If you are the Son of God, command these stones to become loaves of bread."
zh: 試探者前來對他說：“你若是 神的兒子，就吩咐這些石頭變成食物吧！”

en: But he answered, "It is written, "' Man shall not live by bread alone, but by every word that comes from the mouth of God.'"
zh: 耶穌回答：“經上記著： ‘人活著，不是單靠食物， 更要靠 神口裡所出的一切話。’”

en: Then the devil took him to the holy city and set him on the pinnacle of the temple
zh: 隨後，魔鬼帶耶穌進了聖城，使他站在殿的最高處，

en: and said to him, "If you are the Son of God, throw yourself down, for it is written, "' He will command his angels concerning you,' and "'On their hands they will bear you up, lest you strike your foot against a stone.'"
zh: 對他說：“你若是 神的兒子，就跳下去吧！因為經上記著： ‘ 神為了你， 會吩咐自己的使者用手托住你， 免得你的腳碰到石頭。’”

en: Jesus said to him, "Again it is written, 'You shall not put the Lord your God to the test.'"
zh: 耶穌對他說：“經上又記著：‘不可試探主你的 神。’”

en: Again, the devil took him to a very high mountain and showed him all the kingdoms of the world and their glory.
zh: 最後，魔鬼帶耶穌上了一座極高的山，把世界各國和各國的榮華都指給他看。

en: And he said to him, "All these I will give you, if you will fall down and worship me."
zh: 並且對他說：“你只要跪下來拜我，我就把這一切都給你。”

en: Then Jesus said to him, "Be gone, Satan! For it is written, "' You shall worship the Lord your God and him only shall you serve.'"
zh: 但耶穌說：“撒但，走開！經上記著： ‘當拜主你的 神， 單要事奉他。’”

en: Then the devil left him, and behold, angels came and were ministering to him.
zh: 於是魔鬼離開了耶穌，有天使前來服事他。

en: Now when he heard that John had been arrested, he withdrew into Galilee.
zh: 耶穌聽見約翰被捕，就往加利利去。

en: And leaving Nazareth he went and lived in Capernaum by the sea, in the territory of Zebulun and Naphtali,
zh: 他又離開拿撒勒，往西布倫和拿弗他利境內近海的迦百農去，住在那裡，

en: so that what was spoken by the prophet Isaiah might be fulfilled:
zh: 為了要應驗以賽亞先知所說的：

en: "The land of Zebulun and the land of Naphtali, the way of the sea, beyond the Jordan, Galilee of the Gentiles-
zh: “西布倫地、拿弗他利地， 沿海之路，約旦河外， 外族人的加利利啊！

en: the people dwelling in darkness have seen a great light, and for those dwelling in the region and shadow of death, on them a light has dawned."
zh: 住在黑暗中的人民， 看見了大光； 死亡幽暗之地的居民， 有光照亮他們。”

en: From that time Jesus began to preach, saying, "Repent, for the kingdom of heaven is at hand."
zh: 從那時起，耶穌就開始傳道，說：“天國近了，你們應當悔改。”

en: While walking by the Sea of Galilee, he saw two brothers, Simon (who is called Peter) and Andrew his brother, casting a net into the sea, for they were fishermen.
zh: 耶穌在加利利海邊行走的時候，看見兄弟二人，就是名叫彼得的西門和他的弟弟安得烈，正在把網撒到海裡去；他們是漁夫。

en: And he said to them, "Follow me, and I will make you fishers of men."
zh: 耶穌就對他們說：“來跟從我，我要使你們作得人的漁夫。”

en: Immediately they left their nets and followed him.
zh: 他們立刻撇下網，跟從了他。

en: And going on from there he saw two other brothers, James the son of Zebedee and John his brother, in the boat with Zebedee their father, mending their nets, and he called them.
zh: 耶穌又往前走，看見另一對兄弟，就是西庇太的兒子雅各和他的兄弟約翰，正和父親西庇太在船上整理魚網，他就呼召他們。

en: Immediately they left the boat and their father and followed him.
zh: 他們立刻離了船，別了父親，跟從了耶穌。

en: And he went throughout all Galilee, teaching in their synagogues and proclaiming the gospel of the kingdom and healing every disease and every affliction among the people.
zh: 耶穌走遍加利利，在各會堂裡教導人，宣揚天國的福音，醫治民間各種疾病、各種病症。

en: So his fame spread throughout all Syria, and they brought him all the sick, those afflicted with various diseases and pains, those oppressed by demons, epileptics, and paralytics, and he healed them.
zh: 他的名聲傳遍了敘利亞全地，人們就把一切患病的，就是患各種疾病、疼痛、鬼附、癲癇、癱瘓的，都帶到他面前，他就醫好他們。

en: And great crowds followed him from Galilee and the Decapolis, and from Jerusalem and Judea, and from beyond the Jordan.
zh: 於是有許多人從加利利、低加波利、耶路撒冷、猶太和約旦河東來跟從耶穌。
